descriptions.english: Cael and his cherubs grant +[effect0.power][health] and [spikes] [effect1.power] to enemy units.

descriptions.chinese_traditional: 凱爾和他的天使寶寶賦予敵方單位+[effect0.power][health]和[spikes][effect1.power]。
